overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a video game (Cyberpunk 2077) showing a character exploring an abandoned dystopian urban plaza and highway underpass. The environment features overgrown vegetation, scattered debris, and futuristic architecture under an overcast sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: abandoned commercial plaza with vending machines and debris

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through abandoned plaza between yellow buildings, passing red vending machines and scattered debris

notable_agents.action: character in pink pants and dark jacket walking ahead through the plaza

entered.detail: two-story yellow commercial buildings with boarded windows and awnings lining both sides of the plaza
red automated vending machine with illuminated display panels
tall palm trees visible above the buildings in the distance
elevated concrete highway structure visible in the far background

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in an abandoned commercial plaza flanked by yellow buildings with boarded windows. The camera follows a character walking forward past a red vending machine and scattered debris. Palm trees and a distant highway overpass are visible under the overcast sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: transition area between abandoned plaza and highway underpass with increasing vegetation

events.description: camera switches to following a character wearing a skull jacket and red pants
ground surface transitions from asphalt to dirt with dense overgrown grass and weeds

agents.ego_description: walking toward the highway overpass through increasingly overgrown terrain, passing concrete barriers

notable_agents.action: character wearing skull graphic jacket and red pants leading the way toward the overpass

entered.detail: tall industrial building with prominent 07 marking and water tanks on roof

segments.scene_description: The camera now follows a character in a skull jacket moving away from the plaza toward a highway overpass. The ground becomes increasingly overgrown with weeds and dirt. The water tower marked 07 becomes visible in the background as the yellow buildings recede to the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: overgrown area beneath highway overpass with accumulated trash and concrete pillars

events.description: entering deep shade under highway overpass, lighting becomes significantly darker and more enclosed
passing large mounds of garbage bags accumulated among the vegetation under the bridge

agents.ego_description: navigating through dense vegetation and trash piles under the concrete overpass, moving between support pillars

entered.detail: large mounds of blue and white garbage bags accumulated under the overpass among the bushes
gray concrete barrier wall running parallel to the highway in the background

segments.scene_description: The character moves deep under the highway overpass where the sky is mostly blocked and lighting becomes dim. Dense bushes and weeds cover the ground, with large piles of garbage bags accumulated around the concrete support pillars. The environment feels enclosed and neglected.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a desolate commercial plaza into the dim, enclosed depths of a highway underpass. It begins by tracking a character walking past boarded-up yellow buildings and a red vending machine, with palm trees and a distant overpass visible under an overcast sky. As the character in a skull jacket moves forward, the yellow buildings recede to the right and the paved ground gives way to increasing patches of weeds and dirt, bringing a water tower marked 07 into view. The scene then shifts as the camera follows the character deep beneath the highway overpass, where the open sky is blocked and the lighting dims. Finally, the environment becomes fully enclosed and neglected, with dense bushes and large piles of garbage bags accumulating around the concrete support pillars.
